pages.text:
General Product Questions

What is CharCoat CC Cable Coating?

It’s a water-based, intumescent fireproof coating that stops fire spread on electrical cables and maintains their functionality for up to 120 minutes.

How does CharCoat CC work?

It expands (intumesces) in fire conditions, forming an insulating layer that prevents flames from spreading and protects cables from extreme heat.

What makes CharCoat CC different from other fire-resistant coatings?

It’s non-derating, UV-stable, waterproof, and has a low dry film thickness (1.6mm) compared to conventional coatings.

Does CharCoat CC completely stop fires?

It prevents flame propagation on cables, buys critical evacuation time, and reduces secondary fire risks but does not eliminate fire hazards completely.

What are the key benefits of CharCoat CC?

Prevents flame spread, maintains cable ampacity, is weatherproof, UV-resistant, and complies with international fire safety standards.

Is CharCoat CC only for fire safety, or does it have other benefits?

Besides fire protection, it enhances cable lifespan, protects against UV degradation, and reduces maintenance costs.

Does it require special handling or protective gear during application?

No, it’s a water-based, non-toxic product and requires only standard PPE like gloves and safety glasses.

Can CharCoat CC be removed or reapplied?

Yes, it can be removed with high-pressure water jets or mechanical scrubbing, and reapplication is easy.

Does CharCoat CC come in different colors?

It is available in white, but can be tinted up to 5% or top-coated with acrylic water-based paint for identification.

Is it tested and certified?

Yes, it meets IEC 60331-11/21, ASTM E84, BS 476, FM 3971-1992 and multiple fire safety and environmental standards.

Application & Installation

How is CharCoat CC applied?

It can be sprayed, brushed, or rolled onto cables. Airless spray is preferred for larger areas.

What equipment is needed for spraying?

Airless spray units (minimum 200 bar pressure) with tip sizes 0.017” – 0.019” are recommended.

How thick should the coating be?

1.6mm dry film thickness (DFT), applied in two coats (3.0mm wet application each).

How long does it take to dry?

Touch dry in 2 hours, full cure in 24-48 hours (depends on humidity and temperature).

Does it require a primer?

No, CharCoat CC is a standalone coating and does not require primers.

Can it be applied over dirty or oily cables?

No, cables must be clean, dry, and free of oil or dust for optimal adhesion.

Does CharCoat CC affect the flexibility of cables?

No, it is highly flexible and does not crack or peel under normal cable movement.

Can it be applied on live cables?

It is recommended to apply it on de-energized cables, but it can be applied on live cables with proper safety measures.

Can CharCoat CC be applied to metal cable trays?

Yes, it should be applied to cables and the inner surfaces of cable trays for complete fire protection.

Does it require a topcoat for outdoor use?

No, CharCoat CC is 100% UV-resistant and weatherproof, so no topcoat is needed.

Performance & Fire Safety

What is the fire rating of CharCoat CC?

It is rated up to 120 minutes at 750°C - 1100°C under IEC 60331-11/21.

Can it prevent cables from catching fire?

It prevents flame spread but does not make cables fireproof.

How does it compare to fire-resistant cables?

It provides a cost-effective alternative by fireproofing standard cables instead of replacing them with expensive fire-resistant cables.

Can it be used in hazardous areas?

Yes, it is used in oil & gas, power plants, chemical industries, and high-risk environments.

Does it stop toxic smoke emissions?

Yes, it minimizes smoke generation and toxic fume emissions, making evacuations safer.

Can it be used in underground tunnels or metros?

Yes, it is ideal for transport infrastructure where fire safety is critical.

What happens to cables coated with CharCoat CC in a fire?

The coating swells (intumesces) to form a protective carbon char layer, reducing heat transfer to the cable.

Is it resistant to short circuits and arc flashes?

It does not prevent electrical faults but reduces fire risk due to short circuits.

Can it withstand high-voltage environments?

Yes, it has been tested on HV power cables up to 8000V.

How does it perform against molten metal drips?

It prevents molten substances from spreading flames in case of a fire.

Durability & Environmental Protection

Is CharCoat CC waterproof?

Yes, it is impermeable and water-resistant.

Is it resistant to chemicals and oils?

Yes, it resists oils, fuels, and various industrial chemicals.

How long does the coating last?

It extends cable life by up to 25 years with proper maintenance.

Is CharCoat CC rodent-resistant?

Yes, it is tested and proven to be rodent-resistant.

Does it contain hazardous materials?

No, it is asbestos-free, halogen-free, mercury-free, and non-toxic.

Commercial & Supply Chain Questions

What industries use CharCoat CC?

Oil & gas, power plants, commercial buildings, tunnels, metros, and data centers.

Is CharCoat CC available globally?

Yes, it is available in multiple countries, including India through Krishaa Passive Fire Protection.

What are the packaging options?

22.5 kg (5-gallon pails), with custom sizes on request.

How should CharCoat CC be stored?

Keep it between 5°C and 32°C, away from direct sunlight and frost.

What is the shelf life?

18 months from the date of manufacture.

Is it easy to transport?

Yes, it is a non-hazardous material, making transport and handling simple.

What is the typical lead time for bulk orders?

Standard orders are fulfilled quickly, with bulk orders depending on project requirements.

Does CharCoat CC require certification before use in India?

It meets international fire safety standards, and local approvals can be obtained as needed.

Do you offer technical support?

Yes, Krishaa provides full technical guidance, demonstrations, and project consultation.

Can you conduct fire tests or demos for our project?

Yes, fire tests can be arranged based on project needs.

Where can I buy CharCoat CC in India?

Krishaa Passive Fire Protection is the official licensed distributor.

Can I become a distributor?

Yes, we are open to new distribution partnerships.

What are the pricing and MOQ?

Pricing depends on volume and project scope. Contact our sales team for details.

Do you offer site visits and audits?

Yes, our team can assess your site and recommend customized solutions.

How do I place an order?

Connect with our sales team at Krishaa for order placement and technical support.
